overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a hooded character walking through a historic Middle Eastern city at night. The character moves from an outdoor cobblestone street through a palace entrance into an interior courtyard with a fountain, showcasing detailed stone architecture and atmospheric lighting.

multi-story stone buildings with small windows and wooden doors
tall palm trees lining the street
irregular stone paving covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone street in a historic city at night. Market stalls and stone buildings line the path, with palm trees visible ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the scene is lit by a mix of moonlight and warm street lamps.

approaching and entering the palace through the grand archway

ornate stone archway with carved details serving as the main entrance
low stone wall with geometric carvings

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a wide plaza and approaches a grand palace entrance. The palace facade dominates the left side with its stone architecture and warm interior lighting visible through windows. The character walks toward the ornate archway entrance, passing other pedestrians in the open cobblestone forecourt.

events.description: entering the dimly lit interior corridor with warm artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow ornate corridor toward the interior courtyard

ornate metal lantern hanging from the ceiling providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed corridor within the palace. The space features ornately carved stone walls, a red carpet runner, and warm lighting from hanging lanterns. The corridor leads toward a visible archway exit into a brighter interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace interior courtyard with central fountain

events.description: emerging from the corridor into the open interior courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking around the courtyard, observing the central fountain and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures standing near the fountain

entered.detail: large rectangular water feature with multiple tiers in the courtyard center
tall stone columns supporting the upper walkways
large ceramic pots with flowering plants arranged along the paths
second-story wooden balconies with railings overlooking the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a spacious interior courtyard featuring a central rectangular fountain. The two-story space is lined with stone columns, potted plants, and balconies above. Warm artificial lighting mixes with the night sky visible overhead, and a few NPCs stand near the fountain as the character explores the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling nocturnal city street into the secluded luxury of a palace courtyard. It begins by trailing a hooded character along a cobblestone path lined with market stalls and palm trees under a mix of moonlight and warm street lamps. As the character turns into a wide plaza, the scene opens up to reveal a grand palace facade before the camera follows them through an ornate archway. The environment then shifts into a narrow, enclosed corridor featuring carved stone walls and a red carpet runner lit by hanging lanterns, which guides the movement toward a bright exit. Finally, the space expands into a spacious interior courtyard where the camera reveals a central rectangular fountain and stone columns under a night sky.
